title: HEALTH CENTERS - 211info
text: MOUNTAIN VALLEYS HEALTH CENTERS HEALTH CENTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary care, urgent care, minor surgery, prenatal care, immunizations, family planning, and a sexually transmitted disease clinic. 498 Main Street Tulelake, CA 96134 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (530) 999-9060 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (530) 999-9060 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts Medi-Cal and private insurance. Sliding scale fee available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, Josephine, Klamath, and Lake Counties Services: Birth Control Counseling Childhood Immunization Community Clinics General Medical Care Prenatal Care Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Urgent Care Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
